attributes.action: Abolish consent form where fake domestic abuse is being claimed
attributes.additional_details: Equal justice for both parties involved. A thorough investigation needs to be undertaken into allegations made where there is insufficient evidence presented.
attributes.background: For fair justice and a full unbiased investigation is undertaken by the Home Office as broadcasted by the BBC in their recent documentary televised on 14th April 2026.

rejection.details:
We are not clear what action you are seeking from the UK Government or Parliament.

You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
'Review how the Home Office deals with False Domestic Abuse Claims to get ILR'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/767745
